title: Amtech I9455 Stirrup pump with gauge
features: VERSATILE: Made from durable aluminium, this stirrup pump is ideal as a hand pump for cars, motorcycles and bicycles
EASY TO USE: 450mm (17.5") in length, it has an easy to read gauge for convenience
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
WIDE APPLICATION: Useful for a range of repair, assembly, and maintenance jobs
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains Aluminum hand pump with gauge See more
